priority_matrix.item: R01 — Add missing require('crypto') to test/mock/cometd-server.js
R02 — Fix silent error swallowing in test promise chains (13 occurrences in crud.js and query.js)
R03 — Fix upsert() to use applyBody helper instead of direct JSON.stringify
R04 — Fix missing space after = operator in lib/api.js (7 occurrences)
R05 — Extract _resubscribeAll() method in lib/cometd.js to eliminate duplicated loop
R06 — Remove redundant Promise.resolve() wrappers in lib/auth.js
R07 — Fix double-quote style in lib/cometd.js to match single-quote ESLint rule
R08 — Hoist inline require('events') to top-level import in test/mock/cometd-server.js
R09 — Modernise onRefresh in lib/auth.js to accept Promise-returning functions
R10 — Decompose getAuthUri 8-block conditional in lib/auth.js using declarative mapping
R11 — Inline redundant rec intermediate variable in createSObject (index.js)
R12 — Replace inline ['Id','id','ID'] magic array with named constant ID_FIELD_VARIANTS in lib/util.js
R13 — Rename checkHeaderCaseInsensitive to headerContains in lib/util.js
R14 — Replace let with const for non-reassigned variables in lib/optionhelper.js
R15 — Rename getFullUri to buildUrl in lib/optionhelper.js to match URL object return type
R16 — Propagate caught errors to transport:down event in lib/cometd.js _connectLoop
R17 — Remove dead code in test/integration.js (undefined init, redundant call, commented code)
R18 — Convert test/mock/sfdc-rest-api.js global mutable state to class-based instance

implementation_sequence.item: R01 — Add missing require('crypto') to test/mock/cometd-server.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Latent crash on WebSocket upgrade path; one-line fix with zero risk that unblocks reliable test execution

implementation_sequence.item: R03 — Fix upsert() to use applyBody helper instead of direct JSON.stringify
implementation_sequence.rationale: Correct functional bug before fixing test error masking, so any newly surfaced test failures are distinguishable as pre-existing production bugs

implementation_sequence.item: R02 — Fix silent error swallowing in test promise chains (13 occurrences)
implementation_sequence.rationale: Apply after R03 so failures revealed by this fix map to real production bugs rather than test infrastructure issues

implementation_sequence.item: R04 — Fix missing space after = operator in lib/api.js (7 occurrences)
implementation_sequence.rationale: Zero-risk ESLint auto-fix; bundle with other ESLint passes in same session

implementation_sequence.item: R07 — Fix double-quote style in lib/cometd.js to match single-quote ESLint rule
implementation_sequence.rationale: Zero-risk ESLint auto-fix; bundle with R04 pass

implementation_sequence.item: R14 — Replace let with const for non-reassigned variables in lib/optionhelper.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Zero-risk ESLint auto-fix; bundle with R04 and R07 pass to complete all ESLint fixable items in one go
Extract Method with clear scope and existing tests; eliminates duplication before any further cometd.js changes

implementation_sequence.item: R08 — Hoist inline require('events') to top-level import in test/mock/cometd-server.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Best applied alongside R01 which already touches the same file's import section

implementation_sequence.item: R06 — Remove redundant Promise.resolve() wrappers in lib/auth.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Trivial inline; apply before R09 and R10 which also touch auth.js to keep that file's diff coherent

implementation_sequence.item: R11 — Inline redundant rec intermediate variable in createSObject (index.js)
implementation_sequence.rationale: Trivial one-line cleanup with no dependencies; low cognitive load

implementation_sequence.item: R12 — Replace inline ['Id','id','ID'] magic array with named constant in lib/util.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Bundle util.js changes together; apply before R13 which also touches util.js

implementation_sequence.item: R13 — Rename checkHeaderCaseInsensitive to headerContains in lib/util.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Apply after R12 to complete all util.js changes in one file session

implementation_sequence.item: R15 — Rename getFullUri to buildUrl in lib/optionhelper.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Two-file rename (optionhelper + http); apply in its own focused change to keep diff reviewable

implementation_sequence.item: R10 — Decompose getAuthUri 8-block conditional in lib/auth.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Algorithm refactor with existing test coverage; apply after R06 cleans up the same file

implementation_sequence.item: R16 — Propagate caught errors to transport:down event in lib/cometd.js _connectLoop
implementation_sequence.rationale: Apply after cometd.js style fixes (R05, R07) are in; adds error argument to existing event emission

implementation_sequence.item: R17 — Remove dead code in test/integration.js
implementation_sequence.rationale: Low-priority cleanup; apply in final housekeeping pass to avoid conflating with functional changes

implementation_sequence.item: R09 — Modernise onRefresh in lib/auth.js to accept Promise-returning functions
implementation_sequence.rationale: Additive API change requiring documentation update; schedule with next version planning to coordinate release notes

implementation_sequence.item: R18 — Convert test/mock/sfdc-rest-api.js global mutable state to class-based instance
implementation_sequence.rationale: Broad test infrastructure change touching every test file; schedule as dedicated sprint to allow focused review and rollback if needed
